description: RG-08 BDC CBN module pack (12 sheets) for monthly BDC regulatory returns.

formulas.description: Total buying volume = sum by currency
Total selling volume = sum by currency
USD rate within CBN allowed band
GBP rate within CBN allowed band
EUR rate within CBN allowed band
CNY rate within CBN allowed band
Other rate within CBN allowed band
Derive BDC minimum capital requirement from category code
Minimum capital requirement must match category-derived value

crossSheetRules.description: Total assets in CAP must equal total assets in FIN
FX volumes must reconcile between FXV and FIN
Branch FX volume total must equal overall FX volume

fields.label: BDC Licence Number
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Unique licence identifier assigned by the Central Bank

fields.label: Reporting Date
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Date of the transactions being reported

fields.label: Transaction Reference
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Unique transaction identifier generated by BDC system

fields.label: Transaction Type
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Indicates whether the BDC is buying or selling foreign currency

fields.label: Currency Pair
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Base currency / counter currency using ISO 4217 codes

fields.label: Foreign Currency Amount
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Amount in the foreign currency leg of the transaction

fields.label: Local Currency Amount
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Equivalent amount in domestic currency

fields.label: Exchange Rate
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Exchange rate applied to the transaction

fields.label: CB Reference Rate
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Central bank reference/market window rate for the day

fields.label: Spread Percentage
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Percentage spread between applied rate and CB reference rate

fields.label: Customer Type
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.enumValues: Individual | Corporate | Government | Non-Resident Individual | Non-Resident Corporate
fields.validationNote: Classification of the customer

fields.label: Customer ID Type
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.enumValues: BVN | NIN | International Passport | Emirates ID | National ID | Drivers Licence | Tax ID
fields.validationNote: Type of identification document presented

fields.label: Customer ID Number
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Unique number from the identification document

fields.label: Customer Name
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Full legal name of the customer

fields.label: Nationality Residency
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Country code of nationality or residency

fields.label: Transaction Purpose Code
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.enumValues: BTA | PTA | MED | EDU | TRD | SVC | INV | REM | OTH
fields.validationNote: Standardised purpose classification code

fields.label: Purpose Description
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Free-text description of the transaction purpose

fields.label: Payment Method
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.enumValues: Cash | Electronic Transfer | Prepaid Card | Cheque | Domiciliary Account
fields.validationNote: Method of settlement for the transaction

fields.label: Source of Funds
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Description of the origin of the customer’s funds

fields.label: Threshold Flag
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Whether the transaction amount is at or above the reporting threshold

fields.label: Transaction DateTime
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Full date and time of transaction execution

fields.label: Operator Staff ID
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Staff ID of the person who processed the transaction

fields.label: Passport Endorsement No
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Endorsement reference stamped in customer’s passport

fields.label: Remarks
fields.helpText: Coverage-mapped from BDC workbook Data Dictionary.
fields.validationNote: Additional notes or comments on the transaction

interModuleDataFlows.description: Aggregate STR counts into NFIU STR
Aggregate CTR counts into NFIU CTR
